name: Banana Oatmeal Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and brown sugar until smooth.
Mix in the egg, buttermilk, and vanilla extract.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the oats, flour,
baking powder, salt, and allspice.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture,
mixing until just combined.
4. Stir in the chopped bananas.
5. Divide batter evenly among greased or paper-lined muffin
tins, filling each cavity about 2/3 full.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick
inserted into the center comes out clean.
Serve warm.
